## Review checklist
- [ ] Scope guard untouched, OR change reviewed by second reviewer
- [ ] No secrets / API keys in diff
- [ ] AI prompts (if changed) versioned under `app/core/prompts/`
- [ ] Tests added or updated for `app/core/` changes
